{{CargoOrgan
|name=Alveolus of Gaia
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10884
|idx=95
|description=Earth's Will was dismembered by Demon Gods. Some organs were retrieved and given as Reconstruction Feast rewards.
|skill=
|hp=2140
|def=344
|atk=263
|rush=249
|gene1=Wind DMG +120
|gene2=Home Facility Resource Outputs +10%
|gene3=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +10%
|gene4=Wind RES +120
|gene5=Home Facility Resource Outputs +10%
|gene6=Home Facility Resource Max Cap +10%
|gene7=Wind DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
